events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May, born on July 19, 1947, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger, born on July 26, 1943, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star', forever changing the music landscape.

angles.name: Music TV Revolution
angles.copy: Remember the day music changed forever? MTV launched on this date in 1981, ironically kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' released in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released in 1994, launching them into Britpop superstardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Twenty-six years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and introduced us to a new era of British rock. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the fields of Woodstock welcomed half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. A true cultural phenomenon.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977, leaving an indelible mark on music.

angles.name: King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll. Elvis Presley's music and influence continue to resonate decades after his passing.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and one of the most famous album covers of all time. Which track is your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, born on September 7, 1951, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that commands attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the unmistakable voice of Oasis, born on September 21, 1972, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still one of the most distinctive voices in British music.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released in 1975
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's powerful message of peace, 'Imagine', first graced the UK charts. Its message remains as relevant as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: On this date, Apple unveiled the very first iPod in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music on the go.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple changed the game for portable music.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is officially James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, of course) to the world's most famous secret agent. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend, John Lennon, born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy icon John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, born on October 27, 1939, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released in 1968
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released in 1968, showcasing their diverse musical directions.

angles.name: White Album Wonders
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles unleashed their sprawling 'White Album' on the world. A bold, experimental masterpiece. What's your hidden gem from the tracklist?
